characters.name: Amanda Snodgrass
characters.description: Amanda SnodgrassGenderFemaleResides inSouth CarolinaOccupationEnglish Teacher (Formerly)AuthorRelationshipsFamilyBill Hayden(Ex-Boyfriend)Brian Biehn(Ex-Boyfriend)Neal Gamby(Boyfriend)FriendsNeal GambyEnemiesJen AbbottBrian BiehnBill HaydenProductionSeasons2First seenThe PrincipalLast seenThe Union of the Wizard & The WarriorPortrayed byGeorgia KingAmanda Snodgrassis a Main Character inVice Principals. She taught English at North Jackson High School until she resigned to become a full time author. Author Brian Biehn(Ex-Boyfriend)Neal Gamby(Boyfriend) Amanda Snodgrass is nice to everyone at North Jackson High considering she suggests to Neal to go easy on the discipline. She and Gamby also have an on/off relationship during the show by arguing then allying again. With certain things she can be very timid and shy, however she is shown to be very headstrong in others.
characters.personality_section: Amanda Snodgrass is nice to everyone at North Jackson High considering she suggests to Neal to go easy on the discipline. characters.name: Belinda Brown
characters.description: Belinda BrownGenderFemaleResides inPhiladelphia (Current)South Carolina (Formely)OccupationPrincipal of North Jackson High School (Formerly)Principal of an all girls school (currently)RelationshipsFamilyDascious Brown (Ex-Husband)Mario Brown (Son)Luke Brown (Son)EnemiesNeal GambyLee RussellProductionSeasons1First seenThe PrincipalLast seenThe Union of the Wizard & The WarriorPortrayed byKimberly Herbert GregoryBelinda Brownwas a main character onVice Principals. She was Principal of North Jackson High School for all ofSeason 1until being forced out of her job. She is portrayed byKimberly Herbert Gregory. South Carolina (Formely) Principal of an all girls school (currently) Belinda is shown to be very charismatic when she first arrives, saying all the right things. However, Lee and Gamby soon come to realize that she is not one to be messed with. She is fiery, intelligent, and confident. Though, she will fire anyone who she seems is unfit for their job. She tends to dislike the language Gamby uses but rarely corrects it. For majority of the first season, she has a good/trusting relationship withLee Russell, and an on/off dislike ofNeal Gamby. Towards the end of the season this changes (vice versa.)

characters.name: Bill Hayden
characters.description: Bill HaydenGenderMaleResides inSouth CarolinaOccupationFormer North Jackson High History TeacherRelationshipsFamilyAmanda Snodgrass(Former Girlfriend)EnemiesNeal GambyProductionSeasons2First seenThe PrincipalLast seenThe KingPortrayed byMike O'GormanBill Haydenis a Recurring Character onVice Principals. He was the History Teacher at North Jackson High School. Bill Hayden first appears to be someone who cares about the planet and is confident in doing so. He appears to known quite a lot about history (as he should.) However, when he tellsAmandathat they should take a break because they have two different break periods, we see that he can be mean and a playboy. He can also be very jealous and cruel. When he sees Amanda and Neal getting closer he questions her constantly. When they are sitting at the lunch table, he makes fun of the book she wrote before Neal comes to her rescue. characters.name: Brian Biehn
characters.description: Brian BiehnGenderMaleResides inSouth CarolinaOccupationCollege ProfessorRelationshipsFamilyAmanda Snodgrass(Ex Girlfriend)EnemiesNeal GambyProductionSeasons1First seenThe KingLast seenSpring BreakPortrayed byFisher StevensBrian Biehnis a Recurring Character onVice Principals. He is a college professor and Former Boyfriend OfAmanda Snodgrass. Brian seems to be a very professional man since he takes his publishing seriously. However, he's not a nice person as he didn’t have a problem telling Amanda he thinks her book is awful and he only agreed to get it published so she could sleep with him. Brian wears glasses and wears a sweater and wears a dress coat he is also Balding. Brian seems to be a very professional man since he takes his publishing seriously. However, he's not a nice person as he didn’t have a problem telling Amanda he thinks her book is awful and he only agreed to get it published so she could sleep with him.

characters.name: Dayshawn
characters.description: DeShaunGenderMaleResides inSouth CarolinaOccupationCafeteria WorkerRelationshipsFriendsNeal GambyProductionSeasons2First seenThe PrincipalLast seenThe Union of the Wizard & The WarriorPortrayed bySheaun MckinneyDayshawnis a main character inVice Principals. He is a cafeteria worker who is good friends withNeal Gamby. He is portrayed bySheaun Mckinney. Dayshawn appears to be a very chill person. He is friends with Neal Gamby and has talks with him during lunch. He seems to keep an eye on the staff and students who eat in the cafeteria as he provides info for Neal. He is normally seen with a black cap, black apron and a yellow dress shirt as part of his uniform. He also has a fading beard. Dayshawn appears to be a very chill person. He is friends with Neal Gamby and has talks with him during lunch. He seems to keep an eye on the staff and students who eat in the cafeteria as he provides info for Neal.

characters.name: Gale Liptrapp
characters.description: Gale LiptrappGenderFemaleResides inSouth CarolinaRelationshipsFamilyNeal Gamby(Ex-Husband)Ray Liptrapp(Husband)Janelle Gamby(Daughter)EnemiesNeal Gamby(sometimes)ProductionSeasons2First seenThe PrincipalPortrayed byBusy PhilippsGale Liptrappis a recurring character onVice Principals. She is the ex wife ofNeal Gamby, current wife ofRay Liptrapp, and mother ofJanelle Gamby. She is portrayed byBusy Philipps. Ray Liptrapp(Husband)Janelle Gamby(Daughter) She seems to be hostile towards Neal whenever she sees him and usually walks away when he speaks and doubts him whenever he says something is true. She is shown to be a good mother to Janelle and loves Ray very much. She is head strong and takes none of Neal's nonsense. She does not seem to hate Neal, but rather dislikes his dramatics and disrespect towards her for divorcing him and Ray for marrying her. She seems to be hostile towards Neal whenever she sees him and usually walks away when he speaks and doubts him whenever he says something is true. characters.name: Janelle Gamby
characters.description: Janelle GambyGenderFemaleResides inSouth CarolinaOccupationStudentRelationshipsFamilyNeal Gamby(Father)Gale Liptrapp(Mother)Ray Liptrapp(Step Dad)ProductionSeasons2First seenThe PrincipalLast seenThe Union of the Wizard & The WarriorPortrayed byMaya G. LoveJanelle Gambyis a Main Character onVice Principals. She is the daughter ofNeal Gamby&Gale Liptrapp. She is portrayed byMaya G. Love Gale Liptrapp(Mother) Ray Liptrapp(Step Dad) Janelle Gamby a very sweet girl as she always follows her parent’s steps and gets good grades in school. Whenever she is with Neal, Ray, and Gale she always listens to Gamby as he is her father. She loves Ray, Gale, and Neal equally. However, she isn't afraid to speak her mind and is very confident in herself. She is always respectful to her dad even when he is being dramatic.

She was North Jackson High’s Civics Teacher until the series finale where she was arrested. She is portrayed byEdi Patterson. Lee RussellAmanda Snodgrass Jen Abbott is shown to be a very mentally unstable person especially when it comes toNeal Gamby. characters.name: Jeremy Haas
characters.description: Jeremy HaasResides inSouth CarolinaOccupationSuperintendentRelationshipsFriendsNeal GambyEnemiesLee RussellProductionSeasons2First seenThe PrincipalPortrayed byBrian HoweJeremy Haasis a Recurring Character onVice Principals. He is the Superintendent of the show’s school district. Jermey is a professional man who doesn’t take excuses for his district. He seemed to trust Belinda Brown running the high school, but he was doubted when she was arguing with Ms.Leblanc. Jermey Hass always dresses professional by wearing a suit in every occasion and always has a agreesive attitude to Lee. Jermey is a professional man who doesn’t take excuses for his district. He seemed to trust Belinda Brown running the high school, but he was doubted when she was arguing with Ms.Leblanc.

characters.name: Lee Russell
characters.description: Lee RussellGenderMaleResides inSouth CarolinaOccupationNorth Jackson High Vice Principal (Formerly)North Jackson High Principal (Formerly)Regional Manager (Currently)RelationshipsFamilyChristine(Ex-Wife)Mia-Cha(Former Mother-in-Law)Lacey Russell (Sister)June Russell (Sister)Four unnamed nephewsFriendsNeal GambyNash(one-sided)EnemiesJen AbbottSeychellesMs. LeBlancMi-ChaBelinda BrownProductionSeasons2First seenThe PrincipalLast seenThe Union of the Wizard & The WarriorPortrayed byWalton GogginsLee Russellis a main character onVice Principals. He andNeal Gambywere both Vice Principals at North Jackson High until Lee took over in season 2 due to Gamby’s shooting. North Jackson High Principal (Formerly)Regional Manager (Currently) Mia-Cha(Former Mother-in-Law)Lacey Russell (Sister)June Russell (Sister)Four unnamed nephews Lee Russell seems to be a very powerful person considering he didn’t care about Principal Welles’s resignation and feuded withNeal Gambyto receive the principal spot. When working he pays no attention to the students and only spies on the teachers to see what they are planning against him. When at home he is very verbally abusive toChristineandMi Cha. He is also very rude to almost everyone (when he doesn't need information from them.) He also has secrets on everyone in the school.

He is also very rude to almost everyone (when he doesn't need information from them.) He also has secrets on everyone in the school.

characters.name: Nash
characters.description: NashGenderFemaleResides inSouth CarolinaOccupationNorth Jackson High School PrincipalFormer North Jackson High Vice PrincipalRelationshipsFriendsLee RussellNeal GambyProductionSeasons1First seenTiger TownLast seenThe Union of the Wizard & The WarriorPortrayed byDale DickeyNashis a Main Character onVice Principals. She was hired as Vice Principal due to Gamby being injured during Season 2. She is portrayed byDale Dickey. Former North Jackson High Vice Principal Neal Gamby Nash seems to be a weak person considering none of the students take her seriously and make fun of her. But she has grown to become North Jackson High’s Principal.

characters.name: Neal Gamby
characters.description: Neal GambyResides inSouth CarolinaOccupationPrincipal Of Forest Hills Middle SchoolNorth Jackson High Vice Principal (Formely)RelationshipsFamilyGale Liptrapp(Ex-Wife)Janelle Gamby(Daughter)FriendsLee RussellAmanda SnodgrassDayshawnEnemiesBelinda BrownJen AbbottBill HaydenRay Liptrapp(very one-sided)ProductionSeasons2First seenThe PrincipalLast seenThe Union of the Wizard & The WarriorPortrayed byDanny McBrideNeal Gambyis a Main Character onVice Principals. He andLee Russellwere Vice Principals at North Jackson High School. He is portrayed byDanny McBride. North Jackson High Vice Principal (Formely) Janelle Gamby(Daughter) Neal Gamby is a very strict man when it comes to his job. When someone tries to interfere with his discipline he ignores them and gives cruel punishments such as ISS, Suspensions, Expulsions. He is always disrespectful toRay Liptrappfor being Gale’s new husband. He, unlikeLee Russell, is shown to have redeeming qualities. He is shown to be able to change his ways.

characters.name: Ray Liptrapp
characters.description: Ray LiptrappGenderMaleResides inSouth CarolinaRelationshipsFamilyGale Liptrapp(Wife)Janelle Gamby(Step-Daughter)FriendsNeal GambyProductionSeasons2First seenThe PrincipalPortrayed byShea WhighamRay Liptrappis a Recurring Character onVice Principals. He is the husband ofGale Liptrappand the step dad ofJanelle Gamby. He is portrayed byShea Whigham. Janelle Gamby(Step-Daughter) Ray seems to be a very supporting guy since he encourages Gamby and Janelle to do what they love best. Ray continues to be respectful to Gamby even though he is disrespectful towards him. He also loves Janelle and Gale a lot and is very good to them. He isn't one to look down on someone. characters.name: Robin Shandrell
characters.description: Robin ShandrellGenderMaleResides inSouth CarolinaOccupationStudentRelationshipsFamilyUnnamed MotherUnnamed Grandfather ("Paw Paw")EnemiesNeal GambyLee RussellProductionSeasons1First seenTiger TownLast seenThe Union of the Wizard & The WarriorPortrayed byConner McVickerRobin Shandrellis a Recurring Character onVice PrincipalsInSeason 2. He was expelled for misbehavior and was brought back by Gamby. Unnamed Grandfather ("Paw Paw") Lee Russell At first, Robin appears hostile. He yells at Gamby and shoves Nash upon finding the two are stalking him at home and at work. However, he is shown to be a compassionate son who is caring for his grandfather.

ConnorSeychellesis a Recurring Character onVice Principals. He is the drama teacher at North Jackson high school. Neal Gamby Seychelles usually wears jeans, scarfs, and sweaters that is his usual everyday outfit. He gets teased for wearing a scarf. You'll never find his haircut looking bad. His barber uses scissors only, no electric clippers.
